properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our God is strong in battle Our God can never fail Through Him our chains our broken In Him the sick are healed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the name of Jesus Giants are defeated Every single mountain has to move You're faithful to Your promise You finish what You started There is none as powerful as You Jesus Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We see the power of Heaven Setting the captives free We are the church, awakened Singing in victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the name of Jesus Giants are defeated Every single mountain has to move You're faithful to Your promise You finish what You started There is none as powerful as You Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Be lifted higher Be lifted higher We lift the sound of Your great name Be lifted higher Be lifted higher Lord, we exhault You in our praise
